issues.description: useAgencyData.ts uses a blanket DbRow type alias with eslint-disable for 17 mapper parameters. Consider adding proper per-table types when the data contracts stabilize.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test suite NODE_OPTIONS needs --max-old-space-size=8192 to complete all test files without OOM. The services.yaml test command should be updated accordingly.

summary: Resolved all 53 lint errors across 15 files (cockpit Three.js, auth gate, data hooks, UI components) bringing lint from 53 errors/14 warnings to 0 errors/14 warnings. Changes are mechanical: proper type casts, hook ordering fixes, ESM imports, and targeted eslint-disable for TSL shader code. 362 existing tests verified to pass.
